capabilities.description: Inspect the public Hermes scaffold mounted read-only in the container.
capabilities.preflight: Check that /workspace/the-ai-crowd or the configured workdir exists.
capabilities.evidence: File listing or git status output.

capabilities.description: Inspect or modify explicitly mounted project repositories.
capabilities.preflight: Confirm mount path, access mode, and repository status.
capabilities.evidence: Scoped git status/diff from the mounted project.

capabilities.description: Read-only Git workspace inspection for dirty state, branch, HEAD, and upstream evidence.
capabilities.preflight: Run workspace-dirty-watch.sh with an explicit --repo and public-safe --label.
capabilities.evidence: Line-oriented wrapper output with dirty flag, status count, branch, HEAD, and local-evidence-only delivery.

capabilities.description: Send direct operator notices through an explicitly configured private channel.
capabilities.preflight: Run messaging-dry-run.sh with a private-ref recipient before any live send.
capabilities.evidence: Dry-run output, live smoke ref when authorized, and sanitized message summary.

capabilities.description: Prepare read-only SSH checks against authorized private hosts without granting mutation authority.
capabilities.preflight: Run ssh-readonly-preflight.sh with private-ref host/user values; live SSH requires private wrapper approval.
capabilities.evidence: Sanitized connectivity/read-only command summary and wrapper refusal evidence for out-of-scope targets.

capabilities.description: Prepare read-only Docker/Compose inspection through a narrow wrapper or private Docker context.
capabilities.preflight: Run compose-readonly-preflight.sh against an explicit repository before any host-control operation.
capabilities.evidence: Compose config/status summary, affected service scope, and no-mutation proof.

capabilities.description: Use SSH client tooling against authorized private hosts.
capabilities.preflight: Confirm key path, target, command, and rollback/undo expectations.
capabilities.evidence: Sanitized command result and host/action summary.

capabilities.description: Control Docker or Compose on a host through reviewed wrapper or context.
capabilities.preflight: Render compose config and show target service scope before mutation.
capabilities.evidence: Compose config, ps/health output, and scoped change summary.

capabilities.description: Support OpenClaw runtime tasks during migration without assuming Hermes-native OpenClaw tools.
requires: OpenClaw fallback or reviewed admin wrapper
capabilities.preflight: Record which task stays in OpenClaw, which wrapper is used, and whether heartbeat/reminders remain OpenClaw-owned.
capabilities.evidence: Task matrix entry, fallback status, or reviewed wrapper evidence.
